song.title: Experiences of Love
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Jesus Lord, How I wish to depart, I am so vile and weak; And why Beloved, Is Your hand stayed on me|| When in darkness I stay? In Your love, so wonderful and marvelous, I can see no shadow turning there. In Your love, so wonderful and marvelous, I can see no shadow turning there.
[V2] 2) O Jesus Lord, How can I follow You, All around is a maze; And Jesus Lord, How can I forward go; Where is Your footprint clear?|| Is there reason why I still can see Your face, With my failings, And such pow’rlessness? Is there reason why I still can see Your face, With my failings, And such pow’rlessness?
[V3] 3) O Jesus Lord, Let me part from this way, It is frightfully dark; And Jesus Lord, Hide Your face from me now, Everywhere I’m perplexed.|| Yet You search my inmost being thoroughly, Still You see I long to be with You; Yet You search my inmost being thoroughly, Still You see I long to be with You.
[V4] 4) O Jesus Lord, Lead me now to abide. You’re the fountain of love; And Jesus, lead me to walk all the way; You are my true delight.|| Though I want to leave You, Running far away, Yet I know that truly I’m in You; Though I want to leave You, Running far away, Yet I know that truly I’m in You.
song.author: Titus Chu
